root.rep_text: หนังสือยืนยันยอด

confirm_date.text: ข้อมูล ณ วันที่

book_no.text: ที่ สอ.กทท.

root.sql:
with tab as ( select (case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' then 'ทุนเรือนหุ้น' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' then replace((select loan_type_description from sc_lon_m_rule where loan_type = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type),' ' , ' ' ) || ' เลขที่สัญญา ' || pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno , 'XX-XXXXXXXXXX' ) when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' then replace((select deposit_name from sc_dep_m_rule where deposit_type_code = sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type),' ' , ' ' ) || ' เลขที่บัญชี ' || pka_com_function.fp_form( sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno , 'XX-XXXXXXXXXX' ) end ) as data_type_desc
, (case when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' then '7' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' then '8' when sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'LON' then '9' end ) as data_type_sort
, replace(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no ),' ' , ' ' ) as member_name , sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as confirm_tdate , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( current_date , 'SD MONTH พ.ศ.YYYY' ) as book_tdate , '!book_no!' as book_no , (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name , (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name , (select manager_position from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_position
from sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > '0' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type not in (select data_type from sc_cls_confirm_data tab where membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date and data_group = 'DEP' and data_type in ('27','30','38','42','44','46','90','91') ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = '05955' --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '09/06/2024'
union
select (case when substr(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code , 0 , 2 ) = 'MS' then 'ซื้อหุ้นเ'||sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc||'เดือนละ' when substr(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code , 0 , 2 ) = 'ML' then 'ผ่อนชำระหนี้เงินกู้เดือนละ' when substr(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code , 0 , 2 ) = 'MD' then 'หักเข้าบัญชีเงินฝากเดือนละ' end ) as data_type_desc
, (case when substr(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code , 0 , 2 ) = 'MS' then '1' when substr(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code , 0 , 2 ) = 'ML' then '2' when substr(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code , 0 , 2 ) = 'MD' then '3' end ) as data_type_sort
, replace(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ),' ' , ' ' ) as member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as membership_no , sum(money_amount_not) as data_balance
, '!confirm_date!' as confirm_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!confirm_date!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as confirm_tdate , substr(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code , 0 , 2 ) as data_group , null as data_type , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( current_date , 'SD MONTH พ.ศ.YYYY' ) as book_tdate , '!book_no!' as book_no , (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name , (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name , (select manager_position from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_position
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type and (CASE extract(month from '!confirm_date!'::date) WHEN '1' THEN '12' ELSE extract(month from '!confirm_date!'::date)-1 END) = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month and (CASE extract(month from '!confirm_date!'::date) WHEN '1' THEN extract(year from '!confirm_date!'::date)-1 ELSE extract(year from '!confirm_date!'::date) END) = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '!membership_no!' group by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , substr(sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code , 0 , 2 ) , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc union
select 'รวมหักเดือนละ' as data_type_desc
, '4' as data_type_sort
, replace(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ),' ' , ' ' ) as member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as membership_no , sum(money_amount_not) as data_balance
, '!confirm_date!' as confirm_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!confirm_date!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY' ) as confirm_tdate , null as data_group , null as data_type , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( current_date , 'SD MONTH พ.ศ.YYYY' ) as book_tdate , '!book_no!' as book_no , (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name , (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name , (select manager_position from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_position
from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type and (CASE extract(month from '!confirm_date!'::date) WHEN '1' THEN '12' ELSE extract(month from '!confirm_date!'::date)-1 END) = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month and (CASE extract(month from '!confirm_date!'::date) WHEN '1' THEN extract(year from '!confirm_date!'::date)-1 ELSE extract(year from '!confirm_date!'::date) END) = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '!membership_no!' group by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc ) select ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY (select distinct data_type_sort from tab where data_type_sort = '4') ORDER BY data_type_sort , data_type) as row_no , tab.* from tab where 1=1 order by membership_no , data_type_sort , data_type
